title: Validate multi-model smoke scripts without real credentials
instruction: Run the multi-model smoke script in dry-run and unit-test modes so endpoint wiring and secret redaction are checked without requiring live API keys.
success_criteria: Dry-run exits with code 0 and prints only environment variable names, not secrets.
Unit tests prove HTTP error text is redacted before output.
Kimi Code model checks fail when expected models are missing.
forbidden_actions: Do not use live API keys.
notes: Real provider smoke tests should be recorded separately with keys injected only through process environment variables.
